effects.effect: You can discard 1 card from your hand; add 1 "Miraculous Fossil" from your deck to your hand.

effects.name: Bond between Partners
effects.effect: Once per turn, after either player's Vivosaur Zones were swapped: you can Charge 1 [Pterasaur] Vivosaur from your discard pile. you can only use this Ability if you have "Joe Wildwest" in your discard pile.

effects.name: Wing Cutter
effects.effect: You can add 1 "Joe Wildwest" from your deck to your hand.
